title: Savory Gooey Moroccan Tofu Tagine
description: A high-protein-friendly Moroccan dish featuring marinated tofu and toasted nuts for a savory, gooey date-night treat.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.notes: Extra-firm tofu, preferably marinated in spices

ingredients.name: Jamaican Dark Rum
ingredients.notes: Used in marinade for extra flavor

ingredients.name: Moroccan Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: Preferably homemade or store-bought, such as ras el hanout

instructions: Marinate tofu in Moroccan spice blend and rum for at least 2 hours.
Heat olive oil in a tagine (Moroccan clay pot) over medium heat. Add onions and garlic; sauté until softened.
Add marinated tofu to the tagine, pressing down gently with spatula to release excess marinade.
Stir in almonds and continue cooking for another 5 minutes, allowing flavors to meld together.
Reduce heat to low, cover the tagine, and let it simmer for about 10-12 minutes until tofu is tender and cheese-like.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro leaves.
